app.title: Multi-Platform Video Analyzer
app.subtitle: Douyin · Bilibili · YouTube
analyze.title: Analyze Video Content
analyze.desc: Enter video links (Douyin/Bilibili/YouTube supported) to analyze content and generate summaries
user.title: Analyze Creator's Works
user.desc: Enter a user/channel profile link to get and summarize their video list
audio.title: Extract Video Audio
audio.desc: Enter a video link to extract and download the audio (MP3 format)
history.title: Task History
footer.credit: Multi-Platform Video Analyzer · Powered by yt-dlp & FFmpeg
footer.tips: Tip: If downloads fail, place a cookies.txt file in the project directory to bypass login restrictions
result.author: Creator
result.ai_content_hint: Content extracted below — copy to any AI tool for analysis:
toast.empty_url: Please enter at least one video link
toast.empty_user: Please enter a user profile link
error.download_fail:
Unable to download video. Login may be required or the video may have been removed.
Tip: Add cookies to cookies.txt to bypass region/login restrictions.
error.timeout: Download timed out, please check your network connection
ai.prompt.analyze:
Please analyze this video content, including:
1. Content topic overview
2. Key information extraction
3. Copywriting style analysis
4. Target audience analysis
5. Content highlights
ai.prompt.user:
Please analyze this creator's works, including:
1. Content niche positioning
2. Creative style analysis
3. Popular video characteristics
4. Content strategy summary
lang.label: Language
